data.title: PR Newswire and Stacker extend partnership to enhance earned media reach for brands. Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, PR Newswire and Stacker have officially disclosed a strategic collaboration to support brands in enhancing their outreach and effectiveness. As a top press release delivery service, PR Newswire will team up with Stacker, the premier article distribution platform designed for earned reach. This partnership aims to assist brands in increasing their visibility and influence in the industry.

data.title: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan sells AF Group to Enstar Group backed by Sixth Street, for future success.
data.description: In Detroit on February 13, 2026, it was announced that Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan has finalized a deal to sell its wholly owned subsidiary, AF Group, to Enstar Group. Enstar Group is a prominent global insurance and reinsurance company supported by investment vehicles managed by affiliates of Sixth.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Beta Bionics investors. Investors with significant losses encouraged to contact.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced substantial losses in Beta Bionics to reach out to him to explore potential avenues for recourse. If your investments in Beta Bionics, whether in stock or options, resulted in significant losses, it is recommended that you contact Wilson directly to review your options and seek guidance on your next steps.

data.title: Lendlease REIT reports 1H FY2026 DPU increase to 1.85 cents, with 10.4% retail rental reversion. Gearing ratio lowered to 38.4%.
data.description: Lendlease Global Commercial Trust Management Pte. Ltd. announced its financial results for the first half of FY2026, highlighting the divestment of Jem office and acquisition of a 70% stake in PLQ Mall in Singapore. With these transactions, 90% of the portfolio value is now in Singapore, boosting exposure to suburban retail. Key financial highlights include a lower weighted average cost of debt at 2.90% and an increased interest coverage ratio of 1.8 times. Gearing ratio decreased to 38.4% while achieving positive retail rental reversion of 10.4% and 7.2% growth in tenant sales. The company secured lower energy tariffs, aiming at a 15% reduction in electricity expenses. Financially, gross revenue and net property income slightly declined YoY due to divestments, but distributable income grew by 11.7% YoY to S$48.6 million in 1H FY2026. The total units increased, with a gain from the Jem office divestment to be distributed in the future. An advance distribution of 1.33 cents per unit was paid, with the remaining DPU at 0.52 cents. The company is focused on delivering stable and sustainable growth in DPU.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Aquestive Therapeutics investors with significant losses. Contact to discuss options.
data.description: Investors who incurred substantial losses in Aquestive Therapeutics are encouraged by Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP to reach out directly to explore potential options. If you have incurred notable losses in Rezolute shares or options and wish to address your legal options, Wilson is available for consultation.

data.title: CSG's rating upgraded to Baa3 by Moody's and affirmed at BBB- by Fitch, reflecting improved governance and financial strategy.
data.description: CSG, an industrial and technology group, is furthering trust in global financial markets. Moody's raised the rating of CSG's supported senior secured debt to Baa3 due to enhanced corporate governance post-IPO, streamlined capital structure, and a more cautious financial approach. Additionally, Fitch Ratings maintained CSG's rating at BBB- with a Stable Outlook, highlighting the company's stability and positive prospects for the future.

data.title: Animal Parasiticides Market projected to reach $17.50 billion by 2031, growing from $12.98 billion in 2026, CAGR of 6.2%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ revealed that the Animal Parasiticides Market is expected to see significant growth. The market, which is currently valued at around USD 12.98 billion in 2026, is forecasted to reach USD 17.50 billion by 2031. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.2%. The comprehensive report includes data presented across 400 market tables and 65 figures, encompassing a wide range of insights for stakeholders in this industry.

data.title: Global Non-GMO Oil Market projected to reach USD 1,998.4 million by 2035 with 3.9% CAGR growth from USD 1,437.7 million in 2025.
data.description: In February 13, 2026, Newark, Delaware, the Non-GMO Oil Market, as per Future Market Insights (FMI), is projected to increase from USD 1,437.7 million in 2025 to USD 1,998.4 million by 2035, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.9%. This growth is attributed to consumers shifting their approach towards cooking oils, showing reluctance in utilizing genetically modified variants.

data.title: i-80 Gold (TSX: IAU) to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 13, 2026. Development highlights to be included.
data.description: i-80 Gold Corp (TSX: IAU) (NYSE American: IAUX) is set to announce its financial and operational performance for the three and twelve months concluding on December 31, 2025, along with key development achievements. The report is expected to be disclosed on Thursday, February 13, 2026, in Toronto.

data.title: Timken Company declares quarterly dividend of 35 cents per share on Feb. 13, 2026. Board of directors approved it.
data.description: In North Canton, Ohio, on February 13, 2026, The Timken Company announced a quarterly cash dividend of 35 cents per share for its shareholders. The company, known for its leadership in engineered bearings and industrial motion technology, trades on the NYSE under the symbol TKR. This dividend payout marks the company's commitment to providing returns to its investors.

If you have suffered significant losses in Wealthfront stock or options and are interested in exploring your options, Wilson invites you to contact him directly.

data.title: Shield AI chosen as autonomy provider for US Air Force's Collaborative Combat Aircraft Program; Hivemind software to fly on Anduril's Fury (YFQ-44A). Washington, Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: Recently, Shield AI was chosen to provide mission autonomy for the U.S. military's Anduril Fury (YFQ-44A) drone. The Hivemind autonomy software developed by Shield AI will be onboard, showcasing the company's advanced technology. The announcement was made on February 13, 2026 in Washington. Shield AI is a leading deep-tech firm specializing in cutting-edge autonomy software and aircraft. This collaboration marks a significant achievement for Shield AI in the defense sector.

data.title: Urban Outfitters releases exclusive Valentine's Day vinyls from iconic and new artists like Fleetwood Mac and Clairo.
data.description: This year, Urban Outfitters is releasing an exclusive Valentine's Day Collection of 7" singles featuring iconic artists like Fleetwood Mac, Clairo, Sixpence None The Richer, sombr, and others. The collection will celebrate a variety of love stories and includes a diverse range of music. This special release is set to hit stores in Philadelphia on February 13, 2026. Get ready to groove to the sounds of love with this limited edition collection of singles.
